description_long: This house features a long, rectangular main structure with a prominent, steeply pitched orange gable roof and a smaller, attached tower-like section at one end. The exterior walls are a muted beige with dark brown vertical supports and trim, giving the building a sturdy, timber-framed appearance. The house has several narrow rectangular windows arranged in a row along one side, and a small, arched main door with a circular window beside it. The roof extends outwards at the rear, creating a slightly curved silhouette, and a chimney is visible at the peak. In the yard, there are archery targets and green rectangular objects, suggesting recreational or training use. The overall design is simple yet functional, with a rustic, medieval-inspired aesthetic.
description: A long, beige house with a steep orange gable roof, timber framing, and a tower-like section. Features narrow windows, an arched door, and archery targets in the yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tower section, main door, and two archery targets with green blocks beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long main structure, row of narrow windows, and three archery targets lined up along the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the house, the curved roof extension, chimney, and green blocks in the yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain wall with four narrow windows and the prominent roof shape.
attribute_entryway_design: Small arched wooden door with a circular window, no porch, minimal overhang, and simple trim
